Game: The Amazing Spider-Man- Lethal Foes 1995-03-17T00:00:00-07:00 Spider-Man's greatest villains take the spotlight, struggling to make their way against heroes and rival villains alike! Featuring the Beetle and Speed Demon, later of the Thunderbolts! Dr. Octopus! The Vulture! Stegron! Swarm! Hydro-Man! The Rhino! The Kingpin! The Answer! And more! And guest-starring Spidey, natch! 1 <1>http://images.launchbox-app.com/b6ef2d51-b032-4645-94c4-698f14709493.png</1> http://images.launchbox-app.com/a267f1b8-d78a-43a8-9ec7-ff512d07e1f2.jpg http://images.launchbox-app.com/495b7458-e2f7-48a8-a0a1-65e8d1f7dc69.png http://images.launchbox-app.com/036f0183-f403-491a-ba80-e3574fc16355.png http://images.launchbox-app.com/f10605f0-e527-4a5b-82f0-4907877fdac7.png 3 Action Agenda Epoch
